hessian_note: Initial res=800/h=1e-4 showed false positive d2L/dai2>0 due to grid error dominating perturbation. At res=1600+ and res=3200, ALL diagonal entries are strongly negative. L ALWAYS decreases when perturbing away from (0,0,-1,0).
bb_proof_structure: COMPLETE: Only extremizer boxes survive at Level 3 (4 levels, 199680 evals)
feasibility_detail: Margin is 104x larger than grid error. Estimated resolution needed for IA proof: ~156. B&B eliminates all non-extremizer boxes in 4 levels. Full interval arithmetic proof is straightforward.
